exercises.code:
def blocking_key(rec):
    toks = rec["name"].casefold().strip().split()
    ap = toks[1] if len(toks) >= 2 else toks[0]
    return f"{ap}|{rec['region'].casefold()}"
print(blocking_key({"name": "Luis Huamán Soto", "region": "Cusco"}))
exercises.justification_from_packet: entity_resolution_score y relationship_signal_score se mantienen separados en la ficha. blocking_key usa token[1] como apellido paterno y region en casefold → huamán|cusco.
entity_resolution_score y relationship_signal_score se mantienen separados en la ficha. er_score 1.0/0.5/0.0 por doc y blocking_key.

precision = tp / (tp + fp)

exercises.code:
pairs = [
    {"id": "P1", "score": 0.2},
    {"id": "P2", "score": 0.55},
    {"id": "P3", "score": 0.7},
    {"id": "P4", "score": 0.9},
]
def clerical_queue(pairs, low=0.4, high=0.7):
    return [p["id"] for p in pairs if low <= p["score"] <= high]
print(clerical_queue(pairs))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Zona gris → needs_review o abstain según política, no auto_fraud. Cola clerical scores en [0.4,0.7].

exercises.code:
txs = [("A","B",10), ("C","D",1), ("B","A",5)]
def direct_txs(txs, a, b):
    return [amt for x, y, amt in txs if {x, y} == {a, b}]
print(direct_txs(txs, "A", "B"))
exercises.justification_from_packet: direct_txs montos entre a y b cualquier direccion. Esto sale del paquete activo de la sección y del iDo/teoría del curso, sin ejecución local.

exercises.code:
def explanation_bullets(er, rel, missing):
    return [
        f"entity_resolution_score={er}",
        f"relationship_signal_score={rel}",
        f"missing_fields={missing}",
    ]
print(explanation_bullets(0.9, 0.4, ["email"]))

exercises.code:
er, rel = 0.9, 0.1
evidence_score = round(0.6 * er + 0.4 * rel, 2)
conflict = abs(er - rel) > 0.5
unc = "high" if conflict else "low"
print(f"evidence_score {evidence_score} | uncertainty {unc} | note senales conflictivas")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Zona gris → needs_review o abstain según política, no auto_fraud. Conflicto er vs rel; score 0.58 high.
